sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74302" key="o)cuko/mmi" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀξῠ-κόμμι</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, a kind of <sense id="n74302.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">gum,</tr_> in the form <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ὀξωκόμῃ</foreign> (dat. sg. fem.), <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">PMag.Osl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.74</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
